HGSS.617.0002:
That red GYARADOS wasn’t acting right.
As I feared, somebody must have forced\r
it to evolve...\f
HGSS.617.0003:
Did you come here because of the
wild tales?\f
You’re [0103,0000,0000]?
I’m Lance, a Trainer like you.\f
I heard some rumblings, so I came to
investigate...\f
I saw the way you battled earlier,
[0103,0000,0000].\f
I can tell that you’re a Trainer
with considerable skill.\f
If you don’t mind, could you help me
investigate? [0200,0000]
HGSS.617.0004:
Did you come here because of the
wild tales?\f
You’re [0103,0000,0000]?
I’m Lance, a Trainer like you.\f
I heard some rumblings, so I came to
investigate...\f
I saw the way you battled earlier,
[0103,0000,0000].\f
I can tell that you’re a Trainer
with considerable skill.\f
If you don’t mind, could you help me
investigate? [0200,0000]
HGSS.617.0005:
Lance: Excellent!\f
It seems that the Lake of Rage’s
MAGIKARP are being forced to evolve.\f
A mysterious radio broadcast coming
from Mahogany is probably the cause.\f
And that suspicious souvenir shop...\f
I’ll be waiting for you in Mahogany,
[0103,0000,0000].
HGSS.617.0006:
Lance: Excellent!\f
It seems that the Lake of Rage’s
MAGIKARP are being forced\r
to evolve.\f
A mysterious radio broadcast coming
from Mahogany is the cause.\f
I’ll be waiting for you, [0103,0000,0000].
HGSS.617.0007:
Oh... Well, if you change your mind,
please help me.
HGSS.617.0008:
Lance: What do you think?
Are you going to help me? [0200,0000]
HGSS.617.0009:
The GYARADOS are angry!
It’s a bad omen!
HGSS.617.0011:
I heard this lake was made by rampaging
GYARADOS.\f
I wonder if there is any connection
to their mass outbreak now?
HGSS.617.0012:
Did my eyes deceive me? I saw a 
red GYARADOS in the Lake of Rage...\f
But I thought GYARADOS were
usually blue?
HGSS.617.0013:
Pryce: The strong rain falling on the
surface seems to be agitating the\r
raging lake.\f
This must have some purpose that we
meet again.\f
Why don’t we exchange our phone
numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.617.0015:
Pryce: I make it a habit to train myself
on Monday mornings to give this lazy\r
body a spine.\f
You could be a good training partner.
I’ll be waiting for your call!
HGSS.617.0016:
Pryce: That’s OK, too.
People ought to have their own ideas.\r
That’s the way it is.
HGSS.617.0017:
Pryce: So? Will you exchange
numbers with me? [0200,0000]
HGSS.617.0018:
Battle with the great catch
I just got!
HGSS.617.0021:
I can only land the same kind of
Pokémon. No matter how long I fish!
HGSS.617.0024:
When you spot a Trainer, it’s time for
a challenge!\r
That’s the way of Trainers!
HGSS.617.0027:
What happened to the red GYARADOS?\f
It’s gone?
I came all the way for it...\f
OK, I challenge you!
HGSS.617.0030:
Lake of Rage
Also Known As GYARADOS Lake
HGSS.617.0035:
Obtained the [0108,0000,0000]!\f
Too bad!
The Bag is full...
